label: Baseline
description: Run the identity scenario to confirm the current-state network and full run lifecycle.

label: M&A / New Customers
description: Add a small acquired account group and test whether the existing network can absorb the new demand.

fields.name: new_customer_count
fields.label: New customer count
fields.help_text: Number of fictional acquired customer locations added to the selected depot/day.

fields.name: avg_cases_per_customer
fields.label: Average cases per customer
fields.help_text: Demand volume used for the stubbed new-customer scenario.

label: Organic New Customer Growth
description: Model new customer wins without an acquisition event using the same network impact pattern.

fields.name: growth_customer_count
fields.label: Growth customer count
fields.help_text: Number of newly won customer locations to add.

fields.name: growth_zone
fields.label: Growth zone
fields.help_text: Fictional geographic pocket where the growth appears.

label: Driver / Truck Count Change
description: Test whether the network remains feasible when available driver or vehicle count changes.

fields.name: driver_delta
fields.label: Driver count change
fields.help_text: Negative values remove drivers; positive values add drivers.

fields.name: allow_overtime
fields.label: Allow overtime
fields.help_text: When enabled, the scenario can trade overtime cost for feasibility.

label: Delivery Frequency / Day Change
description: Evaluate shifting customer cadence or delivery days while preserving service feasibility.

fields.name: target_customers
fields.label: Target customer segment
fields.help_text: Customer group eligible for day changes in the stub.

fields.name: target_day
fields.label: Target day
fields.help_text: New delivery day used for eligible customers.

label: Facility / Warehouse Move
description: Move a depot location and evaluate route duration and service-window feasibility.

fields.name: new_depot_location
fields.label: New depot location
fields.help_text: Fictional replacement depot coordinates for this scenario.

fields.name: preserve_service_windows
fields.label: Preserve current service windows
fields.help_text: When true, the scenario fails if the move creates hard service-window violations.
